description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, reminiscent of the classic Les Paul style. The body is finished in a light gray color with a subtle wood grain texture, and it features two humbucker pickups, a three-way toggle switch, and four control knobs for volume and tone adjustment. The neck is a lighter wood tone, likely maple, and is fitted with metallic frets and dot inlays. The headstock is angled and equipped with six inline tuning pegs, and there is a visible circular jack input on the front. The back of the guitar is plain, with a rounded contour for comfort. The overall construction suggests a robust instrument suitable for urban street performances or garage bands.
description: A light gray, single-cutaway electric guitar with dual humbucker pickups, four control knobs, and a maple neck. The design is classic and robust, ideal for urban music scenes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pickups, control knobs, toggle switch, and jack input, with the full fretboard and headstock visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's thickness and the protruding bridge and control knobs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the body, neck, and headstock, with no electronics or hardware visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the body contour and the edge of the control hardware.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, and a simple contour.
